name: milcery
flavor_texts: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream.
They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.
text: Milcery is the Cream Pokémon. It is a fairy-type Pokémon. Abilities: sweet-veil, aroma-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 45, Attack: 40, Defense: 40, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 61, Speed: 34. Evolution line: milcery → alcremie. Lore: This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream. They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.
